content: Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative improvement framework can be augmented with multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid 'multi-lens self-refinement' pipeline that avoids the local optimum trap common to single-perspective self-improvement. This hybrid approach retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled data while leveraging perspective diversity to boost output quality beyond what either approach can achieve alone.
